TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall Backup AOC:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AOC FortiGate 100F. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: ND- Scan and verify reports AOC
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed ND scans across the required systems and thoroughly reviewed the generated reports (AOC) to ensure accuracy, completeness, and compliance with requirements. Verified that scan results were successfully generated without errors and validated the findings as expected.Update d the list in teams channel.

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AOC:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AOC:- FortiGate 100F. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Our Security Mechanism sending us alert regarding a file is vulnerable to the system in the host AAOC- 20.
TimeEntry.Notes: Our Security Mechanism sending us alert regarding a file is vulnerable to the system in the host AAOC- 20. Kindly take a look for the reference.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.132 on AAOC-20, AAOC-24, AAOC-28, AAOC-BACKUP-LAP
TimeEntry.Notes:
Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.132 on AAOC-20, AAOC-24, AAOC-28, AAOC-BACKUP-LAP

Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on is old version V0.14.96. Connected to the machines
AAOC-20, AAOC-24, AAOC-28, AAOC-BACKUP-LAP from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.132. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Login to the Huntress portal and check policies and Security settings
TimeEntry.Notes: Connec to the Huntress portal and check policies and Security settings

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AOC:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AOC:- FortiGate 100F Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.9.9533 updated on machine AAOC-20, AAOC-24, AAOC-25, AAOC-28
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine AAOC-20, AAOC-24, AAOC-25, AAOC-28 running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.19.W - AAOC-20,AAOC-24,AAOC-25,AAOC-BACKUP-LA
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine AAOC-20,AAOC-24,AAOC-25,AAOC-BACKUP-LAP running with old version of 
Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine  and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest
version (11.5.2600.19.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AOC:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AOC:- FortiGate 100F Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: AAOC-20,AAOC-24,AAOC-28 : Found outdated version of cisco umbrella, updated
TimeEntry.Notes: I downloaded the latest package from the portal and successfully updated the installation to cisco-secure-client-win-5.1.14.145. I also confirmed that it is syncing properly with the Cisco portal and that the MyRMM database reflects the same update.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Dynamic Group Creation & Huntress Learner Sync Configuration for AOC
TimeEntry.Notes: Configured a new Microsoft Entra ID Dynamic User Group specifically designed to include only licensed mailbox-enabled users. Created the group using a validated dynamic membership rule that filters for active, member-type accounts with an enabled Exchange Online service plan, ensuring only real, licensed users are included. After successfully creating and verifying the dynamic group membership logic, proceeded to integrate Huntress SAT with Microsoft Graph. In the Huntress portal, navigated to Integrations &rarr; Providers, selected the AOC tenant, and chose the newly created dynamic user group (AOC_Users) as the group to sync learners from. Enabled the option to exclude unlicensed and non-human learner identities, ensuring only properly licensed human users can be provisioned as Huntress learners. Confirmed that Use UPN as unique email address was selected to maintain identity accuracy. Activated Automatic Daily Sync so learner accounts are continuously updated based on group membership changes. Also enabled attribute sharing options (Status, First Name, Last Name, Employee ID, Department, Manager) and verified advanced settings related to learner activation/inactivation and department creation. Completed validation of the sync configuration to ensure that only authorised, licensed users will populate within Huntress SAT moving forward
